ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "name" TEXT /* Title of the game */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the developer of the game */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genre of the game */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform on which the game is released */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "dlc_id" INTEGER /* Reference to downloadable content (DLC) related to the game */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the game (e.g., In Development, Released, Discontinued) */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Age rating of the game (e.g., E, M, T) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_dlc_id FOREIGN KEY ("dlc_id") REFERENCES dlc ("dlc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the developer */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the developer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Founding date of the publisher */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game sold */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold in the transaction */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale occurred */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the sale occurred */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review record */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the game (1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided by the user */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes the review has received */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes the review has received */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the review was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Name or username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, moderator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Last activity date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the platform */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dlc" (
  "dlc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each DLC */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the DLC */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the DLC */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the DLC */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the DLC is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dlc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dlc_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
